title: Updates
subtitle: Check for and apply binary updates to this GPROXY instance.

confirm.title: Update and restart?
confirm.description: This downloads the new binary, keeps the previous version as .prev for rollback, and restarts GPROXY automatically.

status.label: Update status
status.stagedRestartNotice: A new binary has been staged.

channel.label: Update Channel
channel.hint: Which release track this instance self-updates from.
